core_mechanism: exploiting the form-invariance of a wave/field equation under coordinate transformations, so that a chosen remapping of space is absorbed into engineered spatially-varying medium parameters that bend the wave along the transformed coordinates
brief_reason: The abstract designs devices (beam shifter, cloaks) by applying Transformation Optics to set the spatially-varying optical parameters of the medium on the surface, which is exactly the trick of encoding a coordinate transformation as position-dependent material properties to steer wave propagation.
